CommonGene.description: Individual gene object for common fuction in nutrient metabolism

Gene_Name.title: Gene_Name
Gene_Name.description: The name or symbol of the Core Gene, e.g., TaGS5, Pi2, BIK1.

Gene_Accession_Number.title: Gene_Accession_Number
Gene_Accession_Number.description: Accession Number (e.g., NCBI, Ensembl, Phytozome ID, LOC_*, AT*, NCBI Locus Tag). Some IDs may be in figures or tables.

Protein_Family_or_Domain.title: Protein_Family_or_Domain
Protein_Family_or_Domain.description: Protein family, enzyme class, TF family, domain architecture, or conserved motif relevant to the gene’s function.

Reference_Genome_Version.title: Reference_Genome_Version
Reference_Genome_Version.description: The reference genome version on which the coordinates are based, e.g., TAIR10, IRGSP-1.0, IWGSC1.0, GRCm39, GRCh38, ASM584v2.

Species.title: Species
Species.description: The main species studied (common name). e.g., Rice, Mouse, E. coli.

Species_Latin_Name.title: Species_Latin_Name
Species_Latin_Name.description: The Latin name of the species, e.g., Oryza sativa, Mus musculus, Escherichia coli.

Variety.title: Variety
Variety.description: The specific variety or cultivar used in the study (e.g., Nipponbare, Zhonghua 11).

Gene_Origin_Species.title: Gene_Origin_Species
Gene_Origin_Species.description: Species in which the gene is naturally found or from which it was derived.

Core_Phenotypic_Effect.title: Core_Phenotypic_Effect
Core_Phenotypic_Effect.description: The main conclusion about how the focal gene affects the target metabolite/product, e.g. promotes β-carotene accumulation; reduces phytic acid content; increases oleic acid proportion.

Terminal_Metabolite.title: Terminal_Metabolite
Terminal_Metabolite.description: The primary terminal metabolite, e.g., β-carotene, anthocyanin, folate, tocopherol, lysine, oleic acid, resistant starch, iron, zinc, glucosinolate.

Terminal_Metabolite_Class.title: Terminal_Metabolite_Class
Terminal_Metabolite_Class.description: Broad biochemical class of the terminal metabolite, e.g., carotenoid, flavonoid, vitamin, fatty acid, amino acid, alkaloid, terpenoid, polysaccharide, mineral nutrient.

Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site.title: Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site
Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site.description: Accumulation organs for terminal metabolite within a species (Note: This must be distinguished from the compound content of the species itself.)

Terminal_Metabolite_Function.title: Terminal_Metabolite_Function
Terminal_Metabolite_Function.description: The functions of the terminal metabolite, e.g., resistance to stress, drought, cold, pests, etc., or the treatment or alleviation of human diseases.

Promoters.title: Promoters
Promoters.description: Promoters and Their Types (Constitutive or Tissue-Specific)

Expression_Pattern.title: Expression_Pattern
Expression_Pattern.description: Tissues, developmental stages, or conditions with high gene expression, e.g., root, stress, or pathogen response.

Subcellular_Localization.title: Subcellular_Localization
Subcellular_Localization.description: The location of the protein within the cell or subcellular fraction, e.g., Nucleus, Cell membrane, Chloroplast, Microsome.

Interacting_Proteins.title: Interacting_Proteins
Interacting_Proteins.description: Experimentally validated interacting proteins or genes (list protein or gene name or ID, separated by semicolon ';').

Core_Validation_Method.title: Core_Validation_Method
Core_Validation_Method.description: Most critical functional validation approaches supporting the gene–metabolite mapping, e.g., knockout, overexpression, complementation, enzyme assay, transactivation assay, transient expression, metabolite profiling, isotope labeling.

Omics_Data.title: Omics_Data
Omics_Data.description: List the omics data types used in the study (e.g., RNA-seq, resequencing, metabolomics, single-cell) and their corresponding database accession numbers.

Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.title: Environment_or_Treatment_Factor
Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.description: Environmental or treatment conditions directly affecting interpretation of the metabolic effect, e.g., light, temperature, nutrient supply, elicitor treatment, salt stress, pathogen infection, exogenous hormone, postharvest treatment.

Breeding_Application_Value.title: Breeding_Application_Value
Breeding_Application_Value.description: Stated or inferred breeding relevance of the gene for nutritional improvement, biofortification, quality enhancement, or metabolic engineering.

Potential_Tradeoffs.title: Potential_Tradeoffs
Potential_Tradeoffs.description: Growth penalty, yield change, stress susceptibility, off-target metabolic shifts.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.title: Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene
Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.description: Main findings in numbered format: '1. ... 2. ... 3. ...'. Focus on nutrient metabolism causality.

Other_Important_Info.title: Other_Important_Info
Other_Important_Info.description: Important metabolism-related details not captured elsewhere, such as contradictory evidence, species-specific nuances, dual function, uncertain catalytic assignment, tissue-specific pathway divergence, or special caveats.

CommonGene.title: CommonGene

CommonGeneExtraction.description: Complete model for extracting common gene function information from nutrient metabolism studies.

Journal.title: Journal

DOI.description: The DOI number of the literature, excluding any URL prefix (e.g., "https://doi.org/"). Only extract the pure DOI string, e.g., 10.1016/j.plantsci.2024.111234.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.title: Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene
Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.description: Main findings in numbered format: '1. ... 2. ... 3. ...'. Focus on nutrient metabolism causality.

Other_Important_Info.title: Other_Important_Info
Other_Important_Info.description: Important metabolism-related details not captured elsewhere, such as contradictory evidence, species-specific nuances, dual function, uncertain catalytic assignment, tissue-specific pathway divergence, or special caveats.

Enzyme_Name.title: Enzyme_Name
Enzyme_Name.description: Standard enzyme name corresponding to the focal gene product.

EC_Number.title: EC_Number
EC_Number.description: Enzyme_Commission number if reported or confidently inferable from the paper’s enzyme assignment.

Catalyzed_Reaction_Description.title: Catalyzed_Reaction_Description
Catalyzed_Reaction_Description.description: The biochemical reaction catalyzed by the enzyme, described in plain but precise form, e.g., converts phytoene to ζ-carotene through desaturation; hydroxylates β-carotene to zeaxanthin.

Primary_Substrate.title: Primary_Substrate
Primary_Substrate.description: Main substrate(s) used by the enzyme in the relevant metabolic step.

Primary_Product.title: Primary_Product
Primary_Product.description: Immediate product(s) generated by the enzyme in the relevant step.

Biosynthetic_Pathway.title: Biosynthetic_Pathway
Biosynthetic_Pathway.description: Name of the metabolic or biosynthetic pathway to which the focal gene is assigned.

Metabolic_Step_Position.title: Metabolic_Step_Position
Metabolic_Step_Position.description: Relative position of the enzymatic step within the pathway: upstream, midstream, downstream, terminal step, branch point, committed step, side-route, salvage/recycling step.

Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway.title: Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway
Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway.description: Specific branch, module, or subpathway in which the enzyme functions, e.g., β-branch of carotenoid pathway; flavonol branch; tocopherol cyclization branch.

End_Product_Connection_Type.title: End_Product_Connection_Type
End_Product_Connection_Type.description: How the catalytic step connects to the target product: directly forms target product, forms immediate precursor, supplies precursor pool, diverts flux toward target product, competes with target-product branch, required for storage/modification of target product.

Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step.title: Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step
Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step.description: Whether the paper supports this enzyme as a rate-limiting enzyme, key control point, committed-step enzyme, terminal determinant, branch-switch enzyme, bottleneck enzyme, or not established.

Breeding_Application_Value.title: Breeding_Application_Value

Potential_Tradeoffs.description: Growth penalty, yield change, stress susceptibility, off-target metabolic shifts.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.title: Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene
Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.description: Main findings in numbered format: '1. ... 2. ... 3. ...'. Focus on nutrient metabolism causality.

Other_Important_Info.title: Other_Important_Info
Other_Important_Info.description: Important metabolism-related details not captured elsewhere, such as contradictory evidence, species-specific nuances, dual function, uncertain catalytic assignment, tissue-specific pathway divergence, or special caveats.

Regulator_Type.title: Regulator_Type
Regulator_Type.description: Type of regulator, e.g., transcription factor, signaling kinase, phosphatase, E3 ligase, transporter regulator, RNA-binding protein, chromatin modifier, miRNA-related factor, scaffold protein, hormone-response regulator, etc.

Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator.title: Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator
Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator.description: Whether the gene regulates the target metabolic process directly, indirectly, or with unresolved directness.

Regulation_Mode.title: Regulation_Mode
Regulation_Mode.description: Mode of regulation, e.g., transcriptional activation, transcriptional repression, chromatin opening, protein stabilization, ubiquitin-mediated degradation, phosphorylation activation, dephosphorylation, RNA silencing, translation control, transport control, feedback regulation.

Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs.title: Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs
Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs.description: Signals, hormones, nutrients, stresses, or developmental cues acting upstream of the regulator.

Primary_Regulatory_Targets.title: Primary_Regulatory_Targets
Primary_Regulatory_Targets.description: The principal downstream genes, enzymes, transporters, or pathway modules regulated by the focal gene.

Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes.title: Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes
Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes.description: Directional effect on key downstream metabolic genes, e.g., activates PSY1 and LCYB; represses FAD2; stabilizes PAP1; promotes degradation of enzyme E.

Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product.title: Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product
Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product.description: Clear statement of why this regulator is considered decisive for the target product, e.g., master regulator, major switch, essential activator, strong repressor, condition-dependent controller, ripening-specific inducer, nutrient-responsive regulator.

Metabolic_Process_Controlled.title: Metabolic_Process_Controlled
Metabolic_Process_Controlled.description: The controlled metabolic process, e.g., biosynthesis, degradation, transport, sequestration, precursor supply, branch selection, remodeling, storage deposition, or feedback homeostasis.

Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation.title: Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation
Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation.description: Whether the regulator participates in feedback, feedforward, autoregulation, metabolite-dependent repression/activation, or homeostatic loops.

Expression_Pattern.title: Expression_Pattern
Expression_Pattern.description: Tissues, developmental stages, or conditions with high gene expression, e.g., root, stress, or pathogen response.

Subcellular_Localization.title: Subcellular_Localization
Subcellular_Localization.description: The location of the protein within the cell or subcellular fraction, e.g., Nucleus, Cell membrane, Chloroplast, Microsome.

Interacting_Proteins.title: Interacting_Proteins
Interacting_Proteins.description: Experimentally validated interacting proteins or genes (list protein or gene name or ID, separated by semicolon ';').

Core_Validation_Method.title: Core_Validation_Method
Core_Validation_Method.description: Most critical functional validation approaches supporting the gene–metabolite mapping, e.g., knockout, overexpression, complementation, enzyme assay, transactivation assay, transient expression, metabolite profiling, isotope labeling.

Omics_Data.title: Omics_Data
Omics_Data.description: List the omics data types used in the study (e.g., RNA-seq, resequencing, metabolomics, single-cell) and their corresponding database accession numbers.

Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.title: Environment_or_Treatment_Factor
Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.description: Environmental or treatment conditions directly affecting interpretation of the metabolic effect, e.g., light, temperature, nutrient supply, elicitor treatment, salt stress, pathogen infection, exogenous hormone, postharvest treatment.

Breeding_Application_Value.title: Breeding_Application_Value
Breeding_Application_Value.description: Stated or inferred breeding relevance of the gene for nutritional improvement, biofortification, quality enhancement, or metabolic engineering.

Potential_Tradeoffs.title: Potential_Tradeoffs
Potential_Tradeoffs.description: Growth penalty, yield change, stress susceptibility, off-target metabolic shifts.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.title: Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene
Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.description: Main findings in numbered format: '1. ... 2. ... 3. ...'. Focus on nutrient metabolism causality.

Other_Important_Info.title: Other_Important_Info
Other_Important_Info.description: Important metabolism-related details not captured elsewhere, such as contradictory evidence, species-specific nuances, dual function, uncertain catalytic assignment, tissue-specific pathway divergence, or special caveats.

Enzyme_Name.title: Enzyme_Name
Enzyme_Name.description: Standard enzyme name corresponding to the focal gene product.

EC_Number.title: EC_Number
EC_Number.description: Enzyme_Commission number if reported or confidently inferable from the paper’s enzyme assignment.

Catalyzed_Reaction_Description.title: Catalyzed_Reaction_Description
Catalyzed_Reaction_Description.description: The biochemical reaction catalyzed by the enzyme, described in plain but precise form, e.g., converts phytoene to ζ-carotene through desaturation; hydroxylates β-carotene to zeaxanthin.

Primary_Substrate.title: Primary_Substrate
Primary_Substrate.description: Main substrate(s) used by the enzyme in the relevant metabolic step.

Primary_Product.title: Primary_Product
Primary_Product.description: Immediate product(s) generated by the enzyme in the relevant step.

Biosynthetic_Pathway.title: Biosynthetic_Pathway
Biosynthetic_Pathway.description: Name of the metabolic or biosynthetic pathway to which the focal gene is assigned.

Metabolic_Step_Position.title: Metabolic_Step_Position
Metabolic_Step_Position.description: Relative position of the enzymatic step within the pathway: upstream, midstream, downstream, terminal step, branch point, committed step, side-route, salvage/recycling step.

Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway.title: Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway
Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway.description: Specific branch, module, or subpathway in which the enzyme functions, e.g., β-branch of carotenoid pathway; flavonol branch; tocopherol cyclization branch.

End_Product_Connection_Type.title: End_Product_Connection_Type
End_Product_Connection_Type.description: How the catalytic step connects to the target product: directly forms target product, forms immediate precursor, supplies precursor pool, diverts flux toward target product, competes with target-product branch, required for storage/modification of target product.

Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step.title: Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step
Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step.description: Whether the paper supports this enzyme as a rate-limiting enzyme, key control point, committed-step enzyme, terminal determinant, branch-switch enzyme, bottleneck enzyme, or not established.

PathwayGene.title: PathwayGene

RegulationGene.description: Individual gene object for regulation fuction in nutrient metabolism

Gene_Name.title: Gene_Name
Gene_Name.description: The name or symbol of the Core Gene, e.g., TaGS5, Pi2, BIK1.

Gene_Accession_Number.title: Gene_Accession_Number
Gene_Accession_Number.description: Accession Number (e.g., NCBI, Ensembl, Phytozome ID, LOC_*, AT*, NCBI Locus Tag). Some IDs may be in figures or tables.

Protein_Family_or_Domain.title: Protein_Family_or_Domain
Protein_Family_or_Domain.description: Protein family, enzyme class, TF family, domain architecture, or conserved motif relevant to the gene’s function.

Reference_Genome_Version.title: Reference_Genome_Version
Reference_Genome_Version.description: The reference genome version on which the coordinates are based, e.g., TAIR10, IRGSP-1.0, IWGSC1.0, GRCm39, GRCh38, ASM584v2.

Species.title: Species
Species.description: The main species studied (common name). e.g., Rice, Mouse, E. coli.

Species_Latin_Name.title: Species_Latin_Name
Species_Latin_Name.description: The Latin name of the species, e.g., Oryza sativa, Mus musculus, Escherichia coli.

Variety.title: Variety
Variety.description: The specific variety or cultivar used in the study (e.g., Nipponbare, Zhonghua 11).

Gene_Origin_Species.title: Gene_Origin_Species
Gene_Origin_Species.description: Species in which the gene is naturally found or from which it was derived.

Core_Phenotypic_Effect.title: Core_Phenotypic_Effect
Core_Phenotypic_Effect.description: The main conclusion about how the focal gene affects the target metabolite/product, e.g. promotes β-carotene accumulation; reduces phytic acid content; increases oleic acid proportion.

Terminal_Metabolite.title: Terminal_Metabolite
Terminal_Metabolite.description: The primary terminal metabolite, e.g., β-carotene, anthocyanin, folate, tocopherol, lysine, oleic acid, resistant starch, iron, zinc, glucosinolate.

Terminal_Metabolite_Class.title: Terminal_Metabolite_Class
Terminal_Metabolite_Class.description: Broad biochemical class of the terminal metabolite, e.g., carotenoid, flavonoid, vitamin, fatty acid, amino acid, alkaloid, terpenoid, polysaccharide, mineral nutrient.

Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site.title: Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site
Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site.description: Accumulation organs for terminal metabolite within a species (Note: This must be distinguished from the compound content of the species itself.)

Terminal_Metabolite_Function.title: Terminal_Metabolite_Function
Terminal_Metabolite_Function.description: The functions of the terminal metabolite, e.g., resistance to stress, drought, cold, pests, etc., or the treatment or alleviation of human diseases.

Promoters.title: Promoters
Promoters.description: Promoters and Their Types (Constitutive or Tissue-Specific)

Expression_Pattern.title: Expression_Pattern
Expression_Pattern.description: Tissues, developmental stages, or conditions with high gene expression, e.g., root, stress, or pathogen response.

Subcellular_Localization.title: Subcellular_Localization
Subcellular_Localization.description: The location of the protein within the cell or subcellular fraction, e.g., Nucleus, Cell membrane, Chloroplast, Microsome.

Interacting_Proteins.title: Interacting_Proteins
Interacting_Proteins.description: Experimentally validated interacting proteins or genes (list protein or gene name or ID, separated by semicolon ';').

Core_Validation_Method.title: Core_Validation_Method
Core_Validation_Method.description: Most critical functional validation approaches supporting the gene–metabolite mapping, e.g., knockout, overexpression, complementation, enzyme assay, transactivation assay, transient expression, metabolite profiling, isotope labeling.

Omics_Data.title: Omics_Data
Omics_Data.description: List the omics data types used in the study (e.g., RNA-seq, resequencing, metabolomics, single-cell) and their corresponding database accession numbers.

Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.title: Environment_or_Treatment_Factor
Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.description: Environmental or treatment conditions directly affecting interpretation of the metabolic effect, e.g., light, temperature, nutrient supply, elicitor treatment, salt stress, pathogen infection, exogenous hormone, postharvest treatment.

Breeding_Application_Value.title: Breeding_Application_Value
Breeding_Application_Value.description: Stated or inferred breeding relevance of the gene for nutritional improvement, biofortification, quality enhancement, or metabolic engineering.

Potential_Tradeoffs.title: Potential_Tradeoffs
Potential_Tradeoffs.description: Growth penalty, yield change, stress susceptibility, off-target metabolic shifts.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.title: Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene
Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.description: Main findings in numbered format: '1. ... 2. ... 3. ...'. Focus on nutrient metabolism causality.

Other_Important_Info.title: Other_Important_Info
Other_Important_Info.description: Important metabolism-related details not captured elsewhere, such as contradictory evidence, species-specific nuances, dual function, uncertain catalytic assignment, tissue-specific pathway divergence, or special caveats.

Regulator_Type.title: Regulator_Type
Regulator_Type.description: Type of regulator, e.g., transcription factor, signaling kinase, phosphatase, E3 ligase, transporter regulator, RNA-binding protein, chromatin modifier, miRNA-related factor, scaffold protein, hormone-response regulator, etc.

Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator.title: Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator
Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator.description: Whether the gene regulates the target metabolic process directly, indirectly, or with unresolved directness.

Regulation_Mode.title: Regulation_Mode
Regulation_Mode.description: Mode of regulation, e.g., transcriptional activation, transcriptional repression, chromatin opening, protein stabilization, ubiquitin-mediated degradation, phosphorylation activation, dephosphorylation, RNA silencing, translation control, transport control, feedback regulation.

Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs.title: Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs
Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs.description: Signals, hormones, nutrients, stresses, or developmental cues acting upstream of the regulator.

Primary_Regulatory_Targets.title: Primary_Regulatory_Targets
Primary_Regulatory_Targets.description: The principal downstream genes, enzymes, transporters, or pathway modules regulated by the focal gene.

Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes.title: Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes
Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes.description: Directional effect on key downstream metabolic genes, e.g., activates PSY1 and LCYB; represses FAD2; stabilizes PAP1; promotes degradation of enzyme E.

Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product.title: Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product
Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product.description: Clear statement of why this regulator is considered decisive for the target product, e.g., master regulator, major switch, essential activator, strong repressor, condition-dependent controller, ripening-specific inducer, nutrient-responsive regulator.

Metabolic_Process_Controlled.title: Metabolic_Process_Controlled
Metabolic_Process_Controlled.description: The controlled metabolic process, e.g., biosynthesis, degradation, transport, sequestration, precursor supply, branch selection, remodeling, storage deposition, or feedback homeostasis.

Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation.title: Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation
Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation.description: Whether the regulator participates in feedback, feedforward, autoregulation, metabolite-dependent repression/activation, or homeostatic loops.

RegulationGene.title: RegulationGene

MultipleGeneExtraction.description: Complete model for extracting common, pathway, and regulation gene function information from nutrient metabolism studies.

Title.description: The full title of the paper.
Title.title: Title

Journal.description: The name of the journal that published the paper.
Journal.title: Journal

DOI.description: The DOI number of the literature, excluding any URL prefix (e.g., "https://doi.org/"). Only extract the pure DOI string, e.g., 10.1016/j.plantsci.2024.111234.
DOI.title: Doi

Common_Genes.description: List of common gene objects extracted from this study. Each gene object contains all gene-specific information including species information.
Common_Genes.title: Common Genes

Pathway_Genes.description: List of pathway gene objects extracted from this study. Each gene object contains all gene-specific information including species information.
Pathway_Genes.title: Pathway Genes

Regulation_Genes.description: List of regulation gene objects extracted from this study. Each gene object contains all gene-specific information including species information.
Regulation_Genes.title: Regulation Genes

MultipleGeneExtraction.title: MultipleGeneExtraction
